title: The Integrated Goods and Services Tax (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 2017
full_text: The Integrated Goods and Services Tax (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 2017 एकीकृत माल और सेवा कर (जम्‍मू-कश्‍मीर राज्‍य परविस्‍तार) अधिनियम, 2017 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201727 Act Number: 27 Enactment Date: 2017-08-23 Act Year: 2017 Short Title: The Integrated Goods and Services Tax (Extension to Jammu and Kashmir) Act, 2017 Hindi Title: एकीकृत माल और सेवा कर (जम्‍मू-कश्‍मीर राज्‍य परविस्‍तार) अधिनियम, 2017 Long Title: An Act to provide for the extension of the Integrated Goods and Services Tax Act, 2017 to the State of Jammu and Kashmir.
